name: Amethyst
description: Speedball Underglazes have always been known for their superior value and for vibrant and consistent firing results, but in late 2023, we answered the call to adjust our formula to enhance brushability and delivered in a big way! Now the entire range of (48) colors features the same rich color palette in a smooth consistency perfect for any application, no modification required. Official product page notes the line fires from Cone 05 through Cone 10, is intermixable, and is dinnerware-safe when used and fired as directed.

name: Clear
description: Speedball Earthenware Glazes offer brilliant colors that fire true consistently. Designed for use on clays that have been bisque-fired to Cone 04, these glazes fire to Cone 05-06. Available in 24 vivid colors, all are lead-free, dinnerware-safe when used and fired as directed, and carry the AP Seal. Made in the USA.

description: Speedball Mid-Fire Glazes, created in collaboration with ceramic artist Nancy Sowder, are available in an array of nature-inspired colors that yield gorgeous mottling effects and a reduction-like look when fired in a standard oxidation kiln at Cone 5-6.
